svg.title: Smart Order Assistant - AI chat process flow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing 4 steps: user query → parameter extraction → restaurant filtering → LLM recommendation

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of queries does the smart order assistant handle?')
sendPrompt('How does the assistant extract calories, budget, time, and tags from a natural language query?')
sendPrompt('How does the restaurant query filter by calories, budget, delivery time, and tags?')
g.text: filter menu items by budget and calories

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is user order history used to personalise recommendations?')
sendPrompt('What prompt does the LLM receive to generate a food recommendation?')
g.text: LLM receives filtered restaurants + user history,

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the final recommendation response look like to the user?')
g.text: Restaurant, item, and reasoning shown to user
